look: UGC-warm stills (Ken Burns on generated on-brand stills)
caption_timing: synthesised proportional word timing (edge-tts 7.x emits no WordBoundary for these voices); caption text equals script.txt exactly

segments.voiceover_phrase: Your puppy's first National Day? Don't wait for the ninth. The fireworks start weeks earlier...
segments.visual_intent: Calm puppy in covered playpen den — hook + strong thumbnail

segments.voiceover_phrase: ...on the rehearsal nights. Build a safe room now. Playpen, curtains drawn, aircon on.
segments.visual_intent: Night calm beside caregiver — safe-room + reassurance

segments.voiceover_phrase: Start sound training three weeks out. Low volume, treats, calm. Walk early, feed early...
...then just sit with them. Don't scold the fear. Comfort doesn't spoil your puppy.
segments.visual_intent: Comfort myth-buster — caregiver hand on calm puppy

segments.voiceover_phrase: Do it early, and the ninth is just another night.
segments.visual_intent: Payoff — return to the den, closes the loop
